summary: Iteration 88: Avatar Header Feature - All tests passed. Backend APIs (GET /api/avatar/me, POST /api/avatar/set-default, POST /api/avatar/generate) working correctly. Frontend header displays humanoid avatar image (not a letter), user name 'Test User Updated' on desktop, profile dropdown with larger avatar, email, and plan badge. Onboarding 2-step flow (Language + Avatar) working with Selfie, Upload, and Skip options.
critical_code_review_comments: AppLayout.jsx: Header correctly displays humanoid avatar image from /api/avatar/me endpoint
AppLayout.jsx: User name displayed with 'hidden sm:block' class (hidden on mobile, visible on desktop)
AppLayout.jsx: Profile dropdown shows larger avatar, user name, email, and plan badge
Onboarding.jsx: 2-step flow (Language selection -> Avatar creation) implemented correctly
Onboarding.jsx: Avatar step has Selfie button, Upload button, and Skip option
avatar.py: GET /api/avatar/me returns avatar_url from tenant settings
avatar.py: POST /api/avatar/set-default saves default avatar URL to tenant settings
avatar.py: POST /api/avatar/generate uses Gemini AI for avatar generation (requires photo_base64)
auth.py: GET /api/auth/me includes avatar_url from tenant settings
context_for_next_testing_agent: Avatar feature fully implemented. Avatar URL stored in tenants.settings JSONB field. Default humanoid avatar is a golden metallic 3D portrait. Header shows user name on desktop (hidden on mobile via 'hidden sm:block' class). Onboarding has 2 steps: Language selection -> Avatar creation. Skip button uses /api/avatar/set-default to set default avatar.

header_avatar_image.details: Header displays humanoid avatar image (golden metallic 3D portrait), not a letter

header_user_name_desktop.details: User name 'Test User Updated' displayed on desktop view

header_user_name_mobile.details: User name hidden on mobile via 'hidden sm:block' CSS class (verified in code)

profile_dropdown.details: Dropdown shows larger avatar, user name, email (test@agentflow.com), and plan badge (ENTERPRISE)

api_avatar_me.details: GET /api/avatar/me returns avatar_url for authenticated user

api_avatar_set_default.details: POST /api/avatar/set-default sets default avatar and returns URL

api_avatar_generate_validation.details: POST /api/avatar/generate returns 422 without photo_base64, 500 with invalid photo

api_auth_me_avatar.details: GET /api/auth/me includes avatar_url from tenant settings

onboarding_step1_language.details: Language selection with 6 options (EN, PT, ES, FR, DE, IT), Continue button works

onboarding_step2_avatar.details: Avatar creation step with Selfie button, Upload button, and Skip option

onboarding_skip_avatar.details: Skip button calls /api/avatar/set-default and redirects to dashboard

navigation_header_persistence.details: Header with avatar and user name visible on Dashboard, Agents, CRM, Settings pages
